---
title: Quiberon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061334/quiberon_x64onw.png
description: Quiberon, Morbihan, Bretagne
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2024/02/01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061334/quiberon_x64onw.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
